touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Tariq Morgan introducing AskElephant's CRM automation capabilities for eCommerce teams. No response received.
Second cold email sent to Tariq Morgan highlighting ROI case study from similar eCommerce company. No response received.
Third cold email sent to Tariq Morgan with video walkthrough of automation features. No response received.
LinkedIn message sent to Tariq Morgan referencing his recent promotion to VP of CS and how AskElephant could help him scale quickly. No response received.
Cold email sent to Tariq Morgan asking about his CS automation stack. Tariq responded expressing interest in learning more about how AskElephant compares to their current evaluation of Fathom.

questions_asked.question: How does AskElephant differ from Fathom? We're currently looking at them.
questions_asked.answer: Scheduled call to discuss positioning and BeaconSpark's specific needs

touches.ai_summary: 13-minute qualification call with Tariq Morgan. Discussed his recent transition to VP of CS role and immediate need to automate CS workflows for 2600+ employee org. Tariq mentioned evaluating Fathom but open to alternatives with better CRM integration.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for implementing a solution?
questions_asked.answer: Looking to make a decision within 60-90 days to support Q3 scaling

questions_asked.question: What are your main pain points with current CS processes?
questions_asked.answer: Manual data entry, inconsistent follow-up tracking, hard to measure CS team performance

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Tariq Morgan with three eCommerce case studies showing 40-60% reduction in manual CRM work. Tariq responded asking about implementation timeline and consulting availability.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take for a company our size?
questions_asked.answer: 6-8 weeks with our automations plus consulting package

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Tariq Morgan with availability for discovery call. Tariq confirmed time and mentioned he'd like to bring in Charlotte Torres (SVP Revenue) at some point in the process.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: 14-minute follow-up call with Tariq Morgan to prepare for broader discovery. Discussed team structure, current tools, and budget expectations. Tariq mentioned he's new to the role (4 months) and needs to show quick wins.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget range for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: Likely $100-150K annually depending on scope and ROI projections

questions_asked.question: Can you support integrations with our existing eCommerce platform and Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have pre-built connectors for major platforms

touches.ai_summary: 42-minute discovery call with Tariq Morgan and team members from Sales and IT. Discussed detailed workflow requirements, data integration needs, and team adoption concerns. IT raised questions about security and data governance. Fathom mentioned as active competitor in evaluation.

questions_asked.question: What security certifications do you have?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliant, enterprise-grade encryption

questions_asked.question: How does pricing work for 75+ seats?
questions_asked.answer: Volume discounts available, will prepare detailed proposal

questions_asked.question: What are your must-have features versus nice-to-haves?
questions_asked.answer: Must-have: CRM automation, call recording, AI summaries. Nice-to-have: advanced analytics

objections: IT concerned about implementation complexity and resource requirements

touches.ai_summary: 12-minute follow-up call with Tariq Morgan to address IT concerns and confirm demo attendees. Tariq mentioned Charlotte Torres (SVP Revenue) wants to see the solution before they move forward.

questions_asked.question: Who should attend the demo from your side?
questions_asked.answer: Myself, Charlotte Torres, and 2-3 managers from Sales and CS teams

touches.ai_summary: 42-minute demo with Tariq Morgan and team. Walked through CRM automation workflows, AI call summarization, and reporting dashboards. Team engaged and asked detailed questions about customization. Charlotte Torres particularly interested in revenue impact metrics.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation rules for different customer segments?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable rule engine with segment-based triggers

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to Fathom's feature set?
questions_asked.answer: Highlighted deeper CRM integration and consulting services as key differentiators

questions_asked.question: What kind of training and onboarding is included?
questions_asked.answer: Full onboarding program included with consulting package

objections: Concern about user adoption and change management across 75 seats
next_steps: Schedule second demo for end users

touches.ai_summary: 34-minute second demo focused on end-user experience with Sales and Account Manager teams. Hands-on walkthrough of daily workflows. Team receptive but raised questions about mobile access and offline capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Is there a mobile app for field sales?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full-featured iOS and Android apps with offline sync

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Proving we can reduce manual CRM work by at least 50% and fast implementation

next_steps: Schedule executive meeting with Charlotte Torres

touches.ai_summary: 42-minute executive meeting with Charlotte Torres, Tariq Morgan, and procurement team. Presented business case, ROI projections, and implementation roadmap. Charlotte focused on strategic alignment with revenue goals and asked about contract flexibility.

questions_asked.question: What does your typical enterprise contract look like?
questions_asked.answer: 1-3 year terms, annual payment options, standard SaaS agreement

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a pilot program?
questions_asked.answer: Can structure as phased rollout starting with CS team then expanding to Sales

questions_asked.question: What are your decision criteria and timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Need to decide by end of month, evaluating Fathom and one other vendor

objections: Charlotte concerned about implementation timing with Q3 revenue push

touches.ai_summary: 33-minute follow-up executive meeting with Charlotte Torres and Tariq Morgan. Reviewed updated proposal with phased implementation. Charlotte expressed strong interest but mentioned budget approval process requires finance review and comparison with Fathom's final offer.

questions_asked.question: What's included in your consulting services?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated consultant for setup, workflow design, training, and 90-day optimization support

questions_asked.question: Can you provide quarterly business reviews?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, included with enterprise package

touches.ai_summary: 25-minute negotiation call with Tariq Morgan and procurement team (Mason Chen, Ade Flores, Mateo Sanchez). Discussed pricing structure, seat count, and contract terms. Procurement pushing for lower per-seat pricing and multi-year discount.

questions_asked.question: What discount can you offer for a 3-year commitment?
questions_asked.answer: Can offer 15% discount for 3-year prepay, 10% for annual payments

questions_asked.question: Is 75 seats your final count or potential to expand?
questions_asked.answer: Starting with 75, likely expanding to 100+ if pilot successful

objections: Procurement says Fathom's pricing is 20% lower per seat
Requesting additional discount to match competitive offer

touches.ai_summary: 26-minute executive meeting with Charlotte Torres to discuss competitive dynamics and value differentiation. Charlotte appreciates consulting services but finance is pushing back on price premium versus Fathom. Discussed ways to structure deal to show value.

questions_asked.question: Can you help us build the business case internally to justify the premium?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, will provide detailed ROI model and executive summary for finance review

questions_asked.question: Is price the main blocker or are there other concerns?
questions_asked.answer: Price is main issue - team loves the product but needs to justify budget

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute pricing call with Tariq Morgan. Discussed creative structuring options including reduced seat count initially with expansion rights, or separating consulting services from platform licensing. Tariq supportive but needs Charlotte's buy-in.

questions_asked.question: What if we started with 60 seats and added the rest in Q4?
questions_asked.answer: Can structure with 60-seat minimum and expansion pricing locked in

touches.ai_summary: 25-minute executive meeting with Charlotte Torres, Tariq Morgan, and Rowan Kapoor (IT Director). Reviewed three pricing scenarios. Charlotte expressed preference for 75-seat option with consulting services but needs to get final approval from CFO. Timeline slipping slightly due to budget review process.

questions_asked.question: Can we defer consulting services to Q4 to reduce upfront cost?
questions_asked.answer: Not recommended - consulting critical for successful implementation and adoption

questions_asked.question: What would it take to close this week?
questions_asked.answer: Need CFO sign-off, likely needs another week for budget approval

objections: CFO requesting additional cost justification given Fathom alternative

touches.ai_summary: 20-minute final negotiation call with Tariq Morgan. Agreed on 75 seats at $111,200 ACV with automations plus consulting package. Tariq confirmed Charlotte and CFO approved the budget. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline and contract next steps.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Target early next month pending legal review of contract
